name: Yet Another Barbecue Sauce #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Place the pan over low heat and simmer for about 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens to a glaze-like consistency.
4. Adjust spiciness by thinning with Canadian beer if desired before using.
5. Note that this recipe is intended as a glaze rather than a sauce, so it may not be as liquidy as traditional barbecue sauces but will provide a flavorful coating for grilled meats and vegetables.
